name: First Vanadium Corp.
summary: First Vanadium Corp. engages in the acquisition, exploration, evaluation, and development of mineral properties in Canada and the United States. The company's flagship property is the Carlin Vanadium project, which comprises 150 unpatented mineral claims covering an area of 2,608 acres located in Elko County, Nevada. It also explores for copper, silver, and gold minerals. The company was formerly known as Cornerstone Metals Inc. and changed its name to First Vanadium Corp. in September 2018. First Vanadium Corp. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
